author: Syed-M-Zeeshan
name: LeakyReLU² + BigramHash + Int5/Int6 + Sliding Window + EMA + AdamW TTT
blurb: Non-record 1×H100 submission. 11L 512d MLP-3x with LeakyReLU(0.5)², BigramHash(1536), mixed Int5/Int6 quantization, FP16 tied embeddings, EMA(0.997), AdamW pre-quant TTT, LZMA compression, sliding window eval (stride=64). Best 1×H100 result: val_bpb 1.3036 (sliding window) at 1090 steps in 10min. Projected 8×H100: ~1.17-1.19 BPB.
note: Non-record: tested on 1×H100 only due to credit limitations. Awaiting 8×H100 credits for official record attempt.
